transcript: Hi Maria! I'm reaching out from DM Clinical Houston about a paid research study. Would you like to see if you may qualify?
What sex were you assigned at birth?
Has a doctor diagnosed you with heart or blood-vessel disease, like a heart attack, stroke, or artery surgery?
Are you currently taking a statin or cholesterol medicine like Lipitor, Crestor, or Zetia?
In the past 3 years, have you had cancer? (Not counting minor skin cancers or cervical carcinoma-in-situ.)
Have you ever had a major organ transplant like a heart, liver, lung, kidney, or bone marrow?
In the last 5 years, have you had a problem with alcohol or drug abuse?
Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding?
Great news, Maria! Based on your answers you may be a good fit. Someone from our team will reach out soon to set up a quick call. Thank you! 💜
Hi David! I'm reaching out from DM Clinical Houston about a paid research study. Would you like to see if you may qualify?
Thank you for sharing that. Based on your answers this particular study isn't a match right now, but we'll keep you in mind for future studies you may fit. 💜

Hi Maria! I'm reaching out from DM Clinical Houston about a paid research study. Would you like to see if you may qualify?
Have you been diagnosed with type 2 diabetes?
Have you ever tried to lose weight with diet or exercise but were not successful?
Have you ever been diagnosed with type 1 diabetes, a diabetic coma, or diabetic ketoacidosis?
In the last 6 months, have you used a GLP-1 medication (such as Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, or Zepbound) or any other injectable medication for diabetes or weight loss?
Have you ever had an organ transplant, or are you waiting for one? (A cornea transplant is OK — answer no for that.)
Have you ever been told you have severe stomach-emptying problems, like gastroparesis or a blocked stomach?
Do you or any close blood relative (parent, sibling, or child) have a history of medullary thyroid cancer or Multiple Endocrine Neoplasia type 2 (MEN2)?
Have you been diagnosed with severe heart failure (NYHA class IV)?
In the last 3 months, have you had a heart attack, a stroke or mini-stroke (TIA), unstable angina, or been hospitalized for heart failure?
Great news, Maria! Based on your answers you may be a good fit. Someone from our team will reach out soon to set up a quick call. Thank you! 💜
Hi David! I'm reaching out from DM Clinical Houston about a paid research study. Would you like to see if you may qualify?
Thank you for sharing that. Based on your answers this particular study isn't a match right now, but we'll keep you in mind for future studies you may fit. 💜
